title.en: Aequorea Jellyfish — Ca²⁺-Triggered Blue, GFP-Shifted Green
title.ko: Aequorea 해파리 — Ca²⁺ 청, GFP 녹 전환

subtitle.en: aequorin emits 470 nm blue when Ca²⁺ binds; in the jellyfish, the photon resonance-transfers to the green-fluorescent-protein partner GFP and the animal emits 509 nm green instead
subtitle.ko: Aequorin이 Ca²⁺에 결합하면 470 nm 청; GFP로 공명 전달되어 509 nm 녹

description.en: Jellyfish bell glow saturates with Ca²⁺. Toggle GFP coupling to switch emission 470→509 nm. Foundation of Shimomura's Nobel-winning aequorin/GFP discovery.
description.ko: Ca²⁺에 따라 jellyfish bell glow 포화. GFP 토글로 470→509 nm 전환. Shimomura Nobel 발견의 기반.
